title: Production Version
learning_objectives: Understand the purpose of Production Version.
Learn how Production Version links BOM and Routing.
Understand Production Version selection during MRP.
Learn the standard SAP Transaction Code used for Production Version.

introduction.title: What is Production Version?
introduction.content: A Production Version is a master data object in SAP PP that links a Material Master with a specific Bill of Material (BOM) and Routing. It tells SAP which manufacturing process should be used to produce a material.

business_purpose.title: Why is Production Version Important?
business_purpose.content: A material may have multiple BOMs or Routings due to different manufacturing methods, plants or engineering revisions. Production Version ensures SAP selects the correct BOM and Routing during Material Requirements Planning (MRP) and Production Order creation.

key_components.description: Unique identifier for the production version.
Material for which the Production Version is created.
BOM assigned to the Production Version.
Routing assigned to the Production Version.
Specifies the date range during which the Production Version is active.
Defines the production quantity range for which the Production Version is applicable.

step_by_step_procedure: Assign the Routing Group and Group Counter.
Maintain Minimum and Maximum Lot Size.
selection_logic: SAP first checks whether a valid Production Version exists.
It verifies the production date falls within the validity period.
It checks whether the order quantity falls within the lot size range.
The corresponding BOM and Routing are selected automatically.

integration.purpose: Production Version is maintained for each material.
Uses Production Version while planning materials.
Automatically copies BOM and Routing into Production Orders.

business_example.title: Example
business_example.content: A stainless steel coil can be manufactured using two different production lines. Each production line has a different Routing and BOM. Two Production Versions are maintained in SAP, allowing the planner to select the appropriate manufacturing process based on capacity or production requirements.

best_practices: Ensure BOM and Routing are released before assignment.
important_notes: Production Version is mandatory in many SAP S/4HANA production planning scenarios.
MRP cannot correctly determine the manufacturing process without a valid Production Version.
Every Production Version should reference a released BOM and Routing.
